prompt:
Polished black-and-white vertical Korean webtoon/manga for a practical Korean blog, 4 stacked panels, mobile-readable. Theme: before lodging sale coupon payment, check three things: daily 10 AM, non-capital population-decline area, final payment discount. Same guide woman with round glasses and traveler with phone. Large speech balloons, no extra text.
Panel 1: phone alarm rings at 10:00. Speech balloon from phone/app, tail pointing to phone screen: "매일 10시 선착순"
Panel 2: guide shows map with rural marker outside capital area. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "비수도권 85곳인지 확인"
Panel 3: traveler compares one-night and multiple-night cards. Speech balloon from traveler, tail to traveler mouth: "1박인지 연박인지 봐야겠네"
Panel 4: final payment screen with discount checked, guide gives thumbs up. Speech balloon from guide, tail to guide mouth: "결제 직전 적용금액 확인!"
Clean high-contrast black-and-white manga, thick panel borders, readable Korean Gothic-like lettering, no garbled text, no brand logos, no extra words.
